title: report-upstream report
description: Outcome of filing a finding via GitHub private vulnerability reporting. On refusal only error is set and nothing was sent upstream.

upstream.description: owner/repo the report was filed against.

private_fork.description: full_name of the temporary private fork, or null if it was not available within the poll window.

truncated.description: True when the description had to be cut to fit GitHub's 65535-character cap.

error.description: Set when the skill refused to file (precondition failed) or the POST was rejected. When non-null nothing was sent upstream.
